verses.text: Tua ciangin mihon kikhopna kulhkongpi-ah Boaz paito-in tua munah tusuk hi. Tua laitakin a tanaute, Boaz' genpa hong pai hi. Tua ahih ciangin Boaz in, “Hong pai dih in, lawm aw; hih lai-ah tu dih in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah hong kihei-in tusuk hi
Tua ciangin amah in khua upate mihing sawm samin, “Hih lai-ah tu dih un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute tusuk uh hi
Tua ciangin amah in a tanaupa kiangah, “Moab gam panin a hong ciahkik Naomi in i tanaute Elimelek' leitang zuak hi

Tua ahih ciangin hih thu nang kiangah kong gen ding ngaihsunin, ‘Hih lai-ah a tu mite' muhna leh keima mi upate' muhna-ah lei in,’ kong ci hi. Na tat ding leh tanh in; ahih hangin na tat kei ding leh, a thu ka theihna dingin kei kiangah hong gen in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang simloh a tanh ding kuamah omlo ahih manin nang kiangah kong pai hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Boaz in, “Naomi' tung panin a lo na lei ni-a kipanin, a site' gamh a site' beh sungah a kiptheihna dingin a sipa' zi Moab numei Ruth zong a lei na hi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin a tanaupa in, “Keima gamhluah siasak khading ka hih manin keima-a' dingin ka tanh thei kei ding hi. Keimah in tanh theilo ka hih ciangin keima tattheihna thu nangmah in tang in,” a ci hi

Nidang lai-in Israel-te sungah tatna leh kikhekna thu-ah ngeina hih bang ahi hi: Thu vaihawm khat peuhpeuh a kipsakna dingin mipa khat in a khedap suahkhia-in a lawmpa pia hi; hih banga hihna pen Israel-te' sungah kipsakna ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin a tanaupa in Boaz kiangah, “Nang-a' dingin lei in,” a cih ciangin amah in a khedap suahkhia hi
Tua ciangin Boaz in upate leh mi khempeuh kiangah, “Tuni-in note pen Naomi' tung panin Elimelek leh Khilion leh Mahlon' neihsa khempeuh ka lei khitna thu teci na hi uh hi

A site' min ama sanggamte leh a pian'na a khuasung panin a maiman'lohna dingin ama gamhluahna-ah a site' min a kizop theihna dingin a si khin Mahlon' zi, Moab numei Ruth zong ka zi dingin ka lei khin hi; note pen tuni-in teci na hi uh hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin kulhkongpi-a om mite khempeuh leh upate in, “Kote, teci ka hi uh hi. Topa in Israel-te' pian'na Rachel leh Leah bangin na innkuan sunga hong pai numei bawl ta hen. Efrathah-ah na dau pai hen la, Bethlehem-ah na min thang ta hen
Topa in hih a khangno lai numei tawh nang hong piak na tate' hangin Judah in Tamar tawh a neih a tapa Perez innkuan tawh kibangin na innkuan piang ta hen,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Boaz in Ruth la-in ama zi a suak hi. Amah in a zi luppih a, Topa in tuanu gaisakin amah in tapa khat nei hi
Tua ciangin nupite in Naomi kiangah, “Tanau neiloin tuni-in nang a hong omsaklo Topa in thupha ngah hen la, Israel-te' sungah ama min thang ta hen

Amah pen nang-a' dingin na nuntakna a hong piakik, leh na khanghamna-ah hong vakpa hi ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh, tapa sagih sangin a thupizaw, nangmah hong it na monu' neih tapa ahi hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Naomi in naungek la-in a ang-ah tawi a, amah a cingnu a suak hi
A veng nupite in a min phuak uh a, “Naomi' sung pan tapa khat suak,” a ci uh hi. Amaute in a min Obed phuak uh hi. Amah pen Jessi' pa hi a, Jessi pen David' pa ahi hi
Tu-in Perez' suanlekhakte hih bang ahi hi: Perez pen Hezron' pa
Hezron pen Ram' pa, Ram pen Amminadab' pa
Amminadab pen Nahshon' pa, Nahshon pen Salmon' pa
Salmon pen Boaz' pa, Boaz pen Obed' pa
Obed pen Jessi' pa, Jessi pen David' pa ahi hi.
